tests.test_body:
define i1 @ult_ult_swap(i8 %a, i8 %b) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @ult_ult_swap(
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i1 false
  %cmp1 = icmp ult i8 %a, %b
  %cmp2 = icmp ult i8 %b, %a
  %and = and i1 %cmp1, %cmp2
  ret i1 %and
}

define i1 @ult_uge_swap(i8 %a, i8 %b) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @ult_uge_swap(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[CMP1:%.*]] = icmp ult i8 [[A:%.*]], [[B:%.*]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i1 [[CMP1]]
  %cmp1 = icmp ult i8 %a, %b
  %cmp2 = icmp uge i8 %b, %a
  %and = and i1 %cmp1, %cmp2
  ret i1 %and
}

define i1 @ult_ule_swap(i8 %a, i8 %b) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @ult_ule_swap(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[CMP2:%.*]] = icmp uge i8 [[B:%.*]], [[A:%.*]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i1 [[CMP2]]
  %cmp1 = icmp ult i8 %a, %b
  %cmp2 = icmp uge i8 %b, %a
  %or = or i1 %cmp1, %cmp2
  ret i1 %or
}

define i1 @ule_ule_swap(i8 %a, i8 %b) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @ule_ule_swap(
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i1 true
  %cmp1 = icmp ule i8 %a, %b
  %cmp2 = icmp ule i8 %b, %a
  %or = or i1 %cmp1, %cmp2
  ret i1 %or
}

issue.title: DCE depends on order
issue.author: ThomasMayerl

comments.author: rotateright
comments.body:
This pattern is more specialized than the one in issue #56653, so we should probably just handle it (and its inverse logic) directly in -instsimplify:
https://alive2.llvm.org/ce/z/NHsj-o

```ll
define i1 @src(i32 %x, i32 %y) {
  %x_ne_0 = icmp ne i32 %x, 0
  %x_or_y = or i32 %x, %y
  %x_or_y_is_0 = icmp eq i32 %x_or_y, 0
  %r = and i1 %x_ne_0, %x_or_y_is_0
  ret i1 %r
}

define i1 @tgt(i32 %x, i32 %y) {
  ret i1 false
}
```

comments.author: rotateright
comments.body: On 2nd thought, we might be able to get this and the other pattern with improvements to llvm::isImpliedCondition() and its callers in InstSimplify.
